title: Dragon 9 Off-Grid LED Wall Clock
description: Physical off-grid digital wall clock. Custom 54-minute hour, 26.66-hour day, automatic 18-minute active/relax sector indicator sweeps, and backup battery.

title: Dragon 9 Brass Pocket Clock (Gold Edition)
description: Premium brass pocket watch running the Sovereign Time System. Features dual dial faces: standard 24h GMT alignment and the Dragon 9 timezone matrix.

title: Dragon 9 Desktop Clock Native App Bundle
description: Off-grid screensaver and taskbar utility for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Automatically syncs with standard internet time coordinates to project the Dragon 9 grid.

title: Future Forward: Corey's Resonant Beats
description: Cooperative audio release featuring high-fidelity hip-hop loops, ambient synths, and breakbeats mixed for off-grid calibration sessions.
